items.title: The Indiana Pacers and Jalen Slawson have agreed to a two-way deal, league sources told HoopsHype. Slawson averaged 7.3 points on 44.2% shooting from the field and 37.5% from 3-point range, 4.4 rebounds, 2.8 assists, 1.5 steals, and 1.1 blocks in 13 games for Indiana last season.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Indiana Pacers and Jalen Slawson have agreed to a two-way deal, league sources told HoopsHype. Slawson averaged 7.3 points on 44.2% shooting from the field and 37.5% from 3-point range, 4.4 rebounds, 2.8 assists, 1.5 steals, and 1.1 blocks in 13 games for Indiana last season.

media.description: Jalen Slawson posted 20 points, nine rebounds and four blocks, but the Pacers suffered their worst loss in Summer League to fall to 1-3.

items.author: CBS Sports
items.body_excerpt: Pacers' Jalen Slawson: Stands out despite SL loss CBS Sports

items.title: 114-98 loss for the Pacers against the Wolves. So many sloppy defensive moments from about everyone. 20 points and 9 rebounds for Jalen Slawson (and 7 fouls + 6 turnovers). 8 points, 6 rebounds, 8 assists for Braden Smith (and 4 turnovers). 1-3 are the summer Pacers. One to go.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: 114-98 loss for the Pacers against the Wolves. So many sloppy defensive moments from about everyone. 20 points and 9 rebounds for Jalen Slawson (and 7 fouls + 6 turnovers). 8 points, 6 rebounds, 8 assists for Braden Smith (and 4 turnovers). 1-3 are the summer Pacers. One to go.

items.title: Some disaster turnovers for the Pacers that half simply inbounding the ball. And they had 18 fouls. Just a lot of sloppy, summer league basketball. Some good stuff, too, including a 12-point, four-block half from Jalen Slawson.

media.title: Star of Pacers Summer League overtime loss was under pressure: 3 things that stood out vs Sixers
media.description: The fight is on for the final Indiana Pacers roster spots, and Jalen Slawson performed in Saturday's overtime loss against the Sixers. Here's what stood out.

items.title: Jalen Slawson rises up and throws it down
items.author: Yahoo Sports
items.body_excerpt: Jalen Slawson rises up and throws it down Yahoo Sports

items.title: Pacers rally back from 24 down and send it to overtime, but they don't score at all in the extra period and lose. It's a 100-93 final score. Summer Pacers are 1-1. 26 points for Jalen Slawson leads the Pacers.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Pacers rally back from 24 down and send it to overtime, but they don't score at all in the extra period and lose. It's a 100-93 final score. Summer Pacers are 1-1. 26 points for Jalen Slawson leads the Pacers.

items.title: Jalen Slawson and Johni Broome exchange words there. Slawson has been wanting a foul call for basically the entire overtime and they got up close and personal.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Jalen Slawson and Johni Broome exchange words there. Slawson has been wanting a foul call for basically the entire overtime and they got up close and personal.

items.title: Sixers close the half strong and the Pacers do not. Sixers up 59-45 at the break. Pacers 13 of 30 from the floor, 4 of 15 from 3, 8 of 11 at the line. Sixers 22 of 40, 5 of 15, 5 of 8. Jalen Slawson eight points. Johnni Broome 17, Matt Rogers 14, Labaron Philon 13 for Philly.
items.author: Dustin Dopirak
items.body_excerpt: Sixers close the half strong and the Pacers do not. Sixers up 59-45 at the break. Pacers 13 of 30 from the floor, 4 of 15 from 3, 8 of 11 at the line. Sixers 22 of 40, 5 of 15, 5 of 8. Jalen Slawson eight points. Johnni Broome 17, Matt Rogers 14, Labaron Philon 13 for Philly.

items.title: This game was 46-43 76ers. Now 59-45 at halftime. Pacers had way too many turnovers and sloppy possessions, then struggled defensively. Jalen Slawson leads with 8 points.
